caption: The video features a man sitting in front of a microphone, likely recording a podcast or an interview for "Boss Talk 101," as indicated by the logo in the bottom right corner. He is wearing a green t-shirt with the text "I ON NEVER DO SHIT AT WORK" and a green cap with a cartoon character on it. The setting appears to be a clothing store, as evidenced by the racks of clothes and mannequins in the background. The walls are adorned with numerous framed photographs, adding a personal touch to the environment. The man seems engaged in conversation, possibly sharing insights or stories related to business or entrepreneurship, given the context of the podcast's theme.
